otherRequirements: Buy a visa on arrival (or an e-VOA online before travel) for stays up to 30 days; it can be extended once for a further 30 days
Passport must be valid for at least 6 months from your date of arrival
Travellers to Bali must pay the tourism levy before or on arrival
sourceNote: gov.uk Indonesia travel advice — visa on arrival for tourism up to 30 days, extendable once (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/indonesia/entry-requirements)
